args.query: SELECT o.OwnerId, SUM(oi.Quantity * oi.UnitPrice) as sales_amount FROM "Order" o JOIN OrderItem oi ON TRIM(REPLACE(o.Id, '#', '')) = TRIM(REPLACE(oi.OrderId, '#', '')) WHERE o.EffectiveDate >= '2022-06-25' AND o.EffectiveDate <= '2022-11-25' GROUP BY o.OwnerId ORDER BY sales_amount DESC;

args.query: SELECT o.OwnerId, SUM(oi.Quantity * oi.UnitPrice) as sales_amount FROM "Order" o JOIN OrderItem oi ON TRIM(REPLACE(o.Id, '#', '')) = TRIM(REPLACE(oi.OrderId, '#', '')) WHERE o.EffectiveDate >= '2022-06-25' AND o.EffectiveDate <= '2022-11-25' GROUP BY o.OwnerId ORDER BY sales_amount DESC LIMIT 5;

args.query: SELECT o.OwnerId, SUM(CAST(oli.TotalPrice AS DOUBLE)) as sales_amount FROM Opportunity o JOIN OpportunityLineItem oli ON TRIM(REPLACE(o.Id, '#', '')) = TRIM(REPLACE(oli.OpportunityId, '#', '')) JOIN Contract c ON TRIM(REPLACE(o.ContractID__c, '#', '')) = TRIM(REPLACE(c.Id, '#', '')) WHERE c.CompanySignedDate >= '2022-06-25' AND c.CompanySignedDate <= '2022-11-25' GROUP BY o.OwnerId ORDER BY sales_amount DESC LIMIT 5;

val_args.query: SELECT o.OwnerId, SUM(CAST(oli.TotalPrice AS DOUBLE)) as sales_amount FROM Opportunity o JOIN OpportunityLineItem oli ON TRIM(REPLACE(o.Id, '#', '')) = TRIM(REPLACE(oli.OpportunityId, '#', '')) JOIN Contract c ON TRIM(REPLACE(o.ContractID__c, '#', '')) = TRIM(REPLACE(c.Id, '#', '')) WHERE c.CompanySignedDate >= '2022-06-25' AND c.CompanySignedDate <= '2022-11-25' GROUP BY o.OwnerId ORDER BY sales_amount DESC LIMIT 5;
